pageContext.name: Finster
pageContext.description: After being locked away for 10,000 years, Rita Repulsa's most loyal henchman is finally free! Finster and his Monster-Matic created countless Putty Patrollers and other monsters to harass the Mighty Morphin Power Rangers.  This 7 scale fully articulated Mighty Morphin Power Rangers ULTIMATES! figure of Finster features premium sculpting & deco and comes with interchangeable hands and a variety of iconic accessories. Even Finster himself probably couldn't create a more detailed version of this made-to-order figure, so there's no reason not to add the Mighty Morphin Power Rangers ULTIMATES! Finster to your collection!
